text:
the Next Line is PCIb4:

pciconf -lv pcib4
pcib4@pci0:1:0:0:       class=0x060400 rev=0x00 hdr=0x01 vendor=0x1912 device=0x0013 subvendor=0x0000 subdevice=0x0000
    vendor     = 'Renesas Technology Corp.'
    device     = 'SH7757 PCIe Switch [PS]'
    class      = bridge
    subclass   = PCI-PCI
